title: Smoky Shawarma Lamb
description: Tender and flavorful lamb shawarma, marinated in a mix of Middle Eastern spices and grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Smoky Shawarma Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available in most Middle Eastern stores or online

ingredients.name: Kissed Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality olive oil for best flavor

ingredients.name: Middle Eastern Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for best flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: Chopped and used as a garnish

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together shawarma spice blend, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and salt.
Add the sliced lamb to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the lamb from the marinade and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the lamb to a cutting board and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing thinly against the grain.
Warm pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the shawarma by slicing the lamb into thin strips and serving it in the pita with parsley and your desired toppings.
